description:
Implement English Translation for Textual Pages

Create English translations for all text-based content pages and integrate them into the English version of the website.

Requirements:
- Identify all textual pages that need translation (e.g., About, FAQ, Terms of Service, Privacy Policy, Help documentation)
- Translate page content from source language to English while maintaining tone and intent
- Update the English site to display translated content instead of original language
- Ensure proper language routing so English site serves English content
- Maintain consistent terminology and style across all translated pages
- Verify all UI labels, headings, and navigation elements are in English
- Test that links, images, and formatting remain intact after translation
- Consider implementing i18n infrastructure if not already present for future language support
title: Translate all textual pages to English
